signature.morphology_notes: Postmitotic neurons migrated from SGZ into inner GCL; axonal projections reach CA3 by 10-11 days; peak spine growth 3-4 weeks
signature.electrophysiology_class: Synaptically integrating; receive glutamatergic input from entorhinal cortex

marker_overlap.notes: Tbr1 is 2x-scoped marker (within_subclass) = strong weight. DCX/NeuN absence expected: immature GN postmitotic stage has exited DCX+ phase; classical definition includes NeuN+ but atlas node annotated as 'late neuroblast/immature granule cell' — likely marginal for NeuN+ but captures transition. Tbr1/Prox1/Igfbpl1/Emx2 profile precisely defines CL:9900002 (immature DG granule neuron)

neuropeptide_overlap.notes: No neuropeptides in classical signature; none in atlas node

candidates.nt_notes: Atlas nt_type: Glut; classical nt_type: glutamatergic

matched_regions: DGdo,me (dentate gyrus dorsal/medial) matches inner GCL soma location
location_alignment.notes: Soma position in DGdo,me aligns with inner GCL; MERFISH validates Igfbpl1, Emx2 in this spatial context; 98% hippocampal allocation; no off-target regions

candidates.rationale: EXACT CL:9900002 mapping. Clusters 0514+0515 define the transcriptomic signature for immature DG granule neuron (Tbr1+/Prox1+/Igfbpl1+/Emx2+). Tbr1 marks postmitotic transition; absence of DCX/NeuN consistent with stage timing (classical definition spans DCX+ late neuroblast into DCX- immature neuron). Correct NT (glutamatergic), correct anatomy (inner GCL with 98% HIP allocation), correct negative markers (no Calbindin, excluding mature stage). MERFISH validates key markers. This is the primary atlas correlate for the classical node.

marker_overlap.notes: Identical TF profile to cluster 0514 (Tbr1+/Prox1+/Emx2+/Igfbpl1+); scoped markers (Rarb distinctive within subclass) strengthen signature. Together 0514+0515 constitute evidence for CL:9900002

candidates.nt_notes: Atlas nt_type: NA (but parent class Glut); classical: glutamatergic; inherited from parent

matched_regions: DGdo,me (dentate gyrus dorsal/medial) matches inner GCL
location_alignment.notes: Perfect hippocampal allocation (HIP:1.0); soma in inner GCL layer; MERFISH validates Igfbpl1, Emx2, Fam163a, Bcl11b

candidates.rationale: EXACT CL:9900002 mapping. Co-defining cluster for immature DG granule neuron transcriptomic signature. Nearly identical marker profile to 0514 (Tbr1/Prox1/Emx2/Igfbpl1 core + additional MERFISH validation of Fam163a, Bcl11b, Cd24a). Perfect anatomical alignment (HIP:1.0). MERFISH-validated markers provide strong evidence. Equal candidate rank with 0514; both together provide the full transcriptomic definition of the classical immature GN.

marker_overlap.notes: No exact matches to classical defining markers. Igfbpl1 and Prox1 are present but not definitive classical markers. Eomes (=Tbr2) indicates type-3/late neuroblast stage (earlier than Tbr1+ immature GN). Calb2 (calretinin) appears — classical negative marker is Calbindin (CALB1), different protein but curator notes 'transient expression in immature granule neurons' — potential false positive on maturity detection

candidates.nt_notes: Atlas nt_type: NA; cannot assess directly; parent class is Glut

location_alignment.notes: Location in DGdo,me is appropriate for DG; 96% HIP allocation; soma distribution includes DG-mo, DG-sg, DG-po (motoring through layers) and some CA3so (off-target); slight anatomical spread

candidates.rationale: BROAD CL:9900001 mapping (neuroblast, not immature GN). Late neuroblast stage: Eomes+ (type-3 progenitor TF), Prox1+ (DG lineage), Calb2 onset (calretinin transiently expressed during immature GN maturation per curator). This cluster bridges late neuroblast→immature GN transition; positioned as a developmental neighbor rather than a primary candidate. Correct anatomy and NT type, but lacks Tbr1+ postmitotic signature definitive of immature GN stage. Secondary candidate for DEVELOPMENTAL TRAJECTORY context.

marker_overlap.notes: No classical marker matches. Vim (vimentin) is a progenitor marker; Neurod4, Nhlh1 are neurogenic TFs; Eomes+ indicates type-2b stage (earlier than type-3). This is an early progenitor cluster, not immature GN

location_alignment.notes: Anatomical location flagged as uncertain ('CTX?' in curator notes); 58% HIP, 37% NA (unassigned); scattered across DG-sg, DG-mo, CA3so, cortex; NOT focused in inner GCL

candidates.rationale: BROAD CL:9900004 mapping (type-2b progenitor, not immature GN). Early neuroblast stage: Vim+ and Eomes+ suggest type-2b intermediate progenitor (earlier developmental step). Location uncertain per curator; hippocampal allocation weaker (58% vs 95%+) with off-target regions. This cluster precedes the immature GN stage; not a candidate for classical immature GN, but may be relevant for PROGENITOR LINEAGE ancestry.

marker_overlap.notes: Supertype contains no defining markers (they are at cluster level). This supertype groups clusters 0512, 0513, 0514, 0515 covering late neuroblast through immature GN. Cannot score directly; clusters 0514+0515 are the immature GN subset.

matched_regions: dentate gyrus (generic) — includes SGZ and GCL
location_alignment.notes: Supertype spans multiple layers (SGZ from 0512-0513; GCL from 0514-0515)

candidates.rationale: BROAD CL:9900001 mapping (broadest common ancestor). Supertype grouping is too heterogeneous (spans 4 clusters across developmental stages). See clusters 0514+0515 for immature GN. Included for completeness but not a primary candidate.

marker_overlap.notes: No classical marker matches. Eomes+ and Sox6+ indicate early type-2b progenitor stage. This is the earliest neuroblast cluster, not immature GN.

matched_regions: UBERON:0009952 (dentate gyrus subgranular zone) — NOT inner GCL
location_alignment.notes: Location in SGZ is correct for early neuroblasts but wrong for immature GN (which is in inner GCL). Off-target regions (CTXsp) noted.

candidates.rationale: BROAD CL:9900004 mapping (type-2b progenitor, not immature GN). Early neuroblast in SGZ: Eomes+ (Tbr2 TF for type-2b), Sox6+, Neurod1+. Represents the earliest stage in the lineage (type-2b→type-3→immature GN progression). Correct NT type but WRONG ANATOMICAL LOCATION (SGZ vs inner GCL) and lacks Tbr1+ postmitotic signature. Not a candidate for immature GN; relevant for UPSTREAM LINEAGE context.

marker_overlap.notes: Supertype with no defining markers; groups cluster 0511 only (early neuroblast)

candidates.rationale: BROAD CL:9900001 mapping. Early neuroblast supertype (Eomes/Tbr2+, Sox6+, type-2b stage in SGZ). Not a candidate for immature GN; upstream developmental stage.

marker_overlap.notes: Tbr1+ and Igfbpl1+ markers present (matching immature GN signature), but IN WRONG ANATOMICAL LOCATION

off_target_regions: UBERON:0002590 (piriform cortex) — DISTANT from dentate gyrus
location_alignment.ccf_broad: OLF:0.5, CTXsp:0.39 (olfactory bulb, cortex — not hippocampus)
location_alignment.notes: FLAGGED: Located in piriform cortex and olfactory regions (OLF:0.5, CTXsp:0.39), not in hippocampus (no HIP allocation). Curator notes: 'in OLF PIR rather than DG, based on MERFISH; still look immature (Igfbpl1, Mex3a, Draxin), but can't be traced to earlier or later stages.' DISTRIBUTED_ACROSS_CLUSTERS caveat applies.

candidates.rationale: NO CL mapping; marked as null/unknown. Cluster exhibits immature granule cell-like markers (Tbr1+/Igfbpl1+), but is ANATOMICALLY OFF-TARGET — located in piriform cortex and olfactory regions, not dentate gyrus. Curator explicitly notes MERFISH confirmed non-DG location. While marker profile is similar to 0514/0515, the anatomical mismatch disqualifies this as a primary candidate. Possible explanation: olfactory bulb/piriform cortex may contain DG-derived migrating neurons or ectopic immature neurons, but the default anchor is the dentate gyrus classical definition. FLAG: DISTRIBUTED_ACROSS_CLUSTERS — immature neuroblast-like cells exist in non-DG regions.

marker_overlap.notes: Tbr1+ and Igfbpl1+ (immature markers), but IN WRONG LOCATION

location_alignment.notes: Olfactory/cortical regions, not hippocampus. Curator notes same caveat: 'in OLF PIR rather than DG, based on MERFISH; still look immature'. DISTRIBUTED_ACROSS_CLUSTERS caveat.

candidates.rationale: NO CL mapping. Similar marker profile to immature GN (Tbr1+/Igfbpl1+, highest Slc17a6 score among clusters), but ANATOMICALLY MISPLACED — endopiriform area, not dentate gyrus. Curator explicitly notes non-DG location via MERFISH. Even lower score than 0516 due to more off-target anatomy (CTXsp:0.61 cortical allocation). FLAG: DISTRIBUTED_ACROSS_CLUSTERS — suggests immature neuroblast-like cells in olfactory system may share transcriptomic signature with DG immature neurons.

non_candidates_summary: Subclass CS20230722_SUBC_038 has no defining markers and cannot be scored; it is a parent grouping. Supertype CS20230722_SUPT_0142 (DG-PIR Ex IMN_3) groups clusters 0516+0517, both located in piriform/olfactory regions and thus anatomically off-target (scored 0.35 and 0.32 respectively). The 11 atlas nodes (1 subclass, 3 supertypes, 7 clusters) were assessed; 7 did not reach high candidate rank due to: (1) earlier developmental stage (clusters 0511, 0513, 0512 — type-2b and late neuroblast, lacking Tbr1+ postmitotic signature), (2) anatomical off-target location (clusters 0516, 0517 in piriform/olfactory, not DG), or (3) insufficient marker matches. Top-ranked candidates (0514, 0515) have EXACT CL:9900002 mapping and comprehensive marker/NT/location alignment. Clusters 0512, 0513, 0511 are ranked as developmental neighbors (upstream progenitor stages) but are not primary candidates for the immature granule neuron classical cell type. Two immature-marker-positive clusters (0516, 0517) are flagged for DISTRIBUTED_ACROSS_CLUSTERS investigation — the same transcriptomic signature appears in non-hippocampal regions, suggesting either migrating populations or olfactory system-resident immature neurons sharing the developmental profile.
